title: GoalCreatedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `goal_created` event — initial declaration or yaml-driven revision of a goal. See spec/goal-lifecycle-v1.md §5.1.

goal_id.description: Stable UUID of the goal; stable across yaml-driven revisions.

prompt.description: Natural-language goal text. REQUIRED on initial creation; MAY be absent on revision when only scheduling metadata changed.

interval_ms.description: Scheduling cadence in milliseconds. Absent for one-shot goals.

mode.description: Scheduling mode — e.g. `"recurring"` or `"once"`. Future variants reserved.

wall_clock_ms.description: Wall-clock anchor for the first run (Unix milliseconds).

project_id.description: User-facing project grouping. Opaque to the protocol.

routine_id.description: Source routine id when materialized from a motebit.yaml routine.

routine_source.description: Free-text source attribution (e.g. yaml file path).

routine_hash.description: Canonical hash of the source routine. Used to detect yaml drift.

update.description: Marker set on yaml-driven revisions; absent on initial creation.
